name: SCP Foundation
description:
[SCP User] As an avid user of monstrous personas, I like some SCP stuff. But a lot of the bots around are… pretty inaccurate, from what I've seen of the open definitions, either overtly friendly or overtly evil. That's what the SH and the CI are for, peoples! Or in-rp the bot will also devolve into inaccurate depictions of the foundation, so I've decided to make my own bot surrounding the foundation. While I want it to be accurate, I've also taken note to make it compact to be usable with JLLM. I tried including the ACS as you can see in the definitions, so please let me know if they classify you properly. I've also tried leaving the user as vague as possible, so you can write where you live and such. As always, have fun and please tell me any criticism you may have.

There are many others like it... but this one is mine.

Tags: Monster!user, MonsterPOV, SCPPOV, Scp!user, creature!user, cryptid!user. Secure, Contain, Protect. MTF, D-class, Chaos Insurgency, GOC, GOI.
creator: Background
